---
title: "Home"
title-block: false
page-layout: full
toc: false
---

::: {.hero}

::: {.hero-text}

# Sergio Escobar

**Mathematics PhD Student**  
University of California, Berkeley

Quantum Information · Mathematical Physics · Probability · Combinatorics

:::

::: {.hero-photo}

![](images/profile.jpg){.profile-photo}

:::

:::

::: {.content-block}

## About

I am a mathematics PhD student at UC Berkeley. My interests include quantum information theory, mathematical physics, Markov chains, representation theory, and combinatorics.

## Research interests

- Mixing times and Markov chains
- Quantum dynamics and Davies generators
- Symmetry and Schur--Weyl duality
- Representation theory in quantum many-body systems
- Combinatorics and probabilistic methods

## Selected papers and notes

See the [Papers](papers/) and [Notes](notes.qmd) pages.

:::
